_purpose: Sir CLI 可改 reflector tick interval / startup delay / propose threshold / scan window 不重启 Jarvis.
_grant: 准则 6.5: 持久化 + CLI 可改. reflector daemon 每 cycle reload config, 改了立即生效.

_field_doc.tick_interval_s: daemon cycle 间隔秒数 (默认 1800 = 30min). 调小 = propose 更快.
_field_doc.startup_delay_s: daemon 启动延迟秒数 (默认 600 = 10min). 让系统稳定后再 propose.
_field_doc.propose_threshold: 同 (from, to) by_command alias 重复 N 次才 propose (默认 3).
_field_doc.scan_window_s: 扫 SWM events 回看窗口秒数 (默认 7200 = 2h).

_history.reason: Phase 4.D CRON tuning — _TICK_INTERVAL_S 等 const 持久化 + CLI 可改, Sir 不重启 Jarvis 调.
